subcodes.first_line: O Trustworthy One! If thou desirest a detailed account of this land, verily therein the fly hath deemed itself an eagle, wherefore God did cast it down [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امین اگر تفصیل این ارض را خواسته باشید ان الذباب فیها استنسر لذا اوقعه الله
subcodes.subjects: @justice and wrath of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @consolation and comfort, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
